name.en-US: Little Office of the Immaculate Heart of Mary

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of Immaculate Heart of Mary, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US: Pope Pius IX., by Brief of March 31, 1876, granted to the faithful who recite devoutly and with a contrite heart, the Little Office of the Immaculate Conception an Indulgence of 300 Days each time.
